TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakilimad == mimaliay a masakapahayśéíÁźÉŚįĎŚĻī "mimaliay a masakapahay!" "kamu nu Zipun, „ÉŹ„ā§„ā≠„É•„Éľ!, kamu nu Ing Haikyu!, imi nu Syakang "mimaliay a masakapahay" nu Zipun mangga ku-kwan-cun-iay a nisulitan tu masakapahay manngga, i 2012 a mihca 2 a bulad 20 a demiad katukuh 2020 a mihca 7 a bulad 20 a demiad i sinbun nu masakapahay Jump" lalid a patahkal, hamin45 a cudadan. katukuh 2024 a mihca 12 a bulad, cacay ku cudad pulung ku nipatahkal pakala tu 7,000 mang a cudadan. nisumadan tilibi musaungayay mangga saayaway puu' i 2014 a mihca 4 a bulal saayaway patahkal, pulung 25 ku kamuan, saktusa puu' i 2015 a mica 10 a bulad saayaway patahkal, pulung 25 a kamuan. "igiay masakapahay mimaliay!malpacaw tu patatuni'an" tini i2024 a mihca 2 a bulad 16 a demiad i Zipu patahkal paazih. baluhay iga vs syaw-ci-zen apatahka paazih. misulit tu hekal ŚČĶšĹúŤÉĆśôĮ misulitay ci Ku-kwan-cun-i kanahatu lecuh i Yen-su kuwan, nika uyni nisulitan angangan u stay-yen-tay-s, syan-tayan atu syen-tay-s kaduba'an syen,-tay a kitizaan amisulit tu hekal. lalekalan u ku-kwan-cun-i zikuz nu pipahezekan nu kaw-cung, na i syen-tay-say a syen-tay sinbungay misyeki tu cacudadan lalabu micudad, saayaway anisulitan u "kuy-pan-sye-pay se-ku-sye-cang a kway-tan", itawya saayaway situngusay misulit i kung-cen aa kuwan, namahiza u kung-cen kuwan mala sasilitan a kungku kuyni. uyni nisulitan sakay U-ye kaw-cung atu liwliw nu hekal ku nisulit, angangan misulit tu tiiay hekal. kanahatu caay ku tatenga'ay angangan ku kaw-cung, nka tatenga' tiniay a cacudadan ku nisulitan. namahiza, uyni nisulitan yadah ku aazihan misengiay tu Yen-su-kuwan cin-mi-tin. zuma, hamin cong-sye nu Zipun tungus mimaliay a kalecapu, hamin mimaliay nu Zipun talakaway a cacudadan malecapu ku mimaliay "cun-kaw madademec mimalil", hamin nu kanatal talakmaway a cacudadan mapulung kalecapuan maduba' "IH ayaw a kadademec" tatenga' a kadademec, i nisulitan izaw tu ku nipatahkal. i cuh-cung atu kaw-cung a ziday, ci Ku-kwan-cun-i u palimaay tu mimalian. ci Ku-kwan i ayaw a kalalid maydih mikulit tu cacay malu angangan misulit tu mimaliay, nika, situngus misulit tu mimaliay a mangga kanca a icelang, sakasa ci Ku-kwan-cun-I mipili' ayaw misanga' tu zumaay a nisulitan tu "se-ku-sye-cang" i "se-ku-sye-cang" hamin pahezek, ci Ku-kwan-cun-I amaala ku mimaliay a mangga, malingatu i "masakapahay JUMP NEXT!" 2011 a kasienawan micunus i sinbunan patahkal tu cacay a nisulitan, kilul i "sinbun nu masakapahay JUMP" 2011 a mihcaan 20, 21 papulu mangguan tulin patahkal tu cacay a nisulitan. kanahatu zikuz ci Ku-kwan-cin-I katulin pakala, nika saayawaymaminay makulkit saayawaw a kamu yadah tatu ku wayway a kamu, kyu sacaycay sa milisimet, mahiza tu nu ayzaay. cacayay a nisulit cacay a mihcaan patahkal zikuz, u pinang muliyaw a misumad, uyni nisulitan tahkal tu i "sinbun nu masakapuhay JUMP"2012 a mihcaan 12 banggu malingaatu tatenga'ay tu patahkal. 2020 a mihca 7 a bulad 20 a demiad, i Zipu a patahkal tu "sinbun nu masakapuhay JUMP" 33„ÉĽ34 pulung bangguan militemuh sazikuz panukas lalid patahkal, 8 a mihca tu pangkiw mapahezek tu. amikining tu nisulitab madem ku 10 a mihcaan,2022 a mihca 4 a bulad 25 a demiad anipatahkalan "sinbun nu masakapahay JUMP" 21„ÉĽ22 pulung banggu patahkal tu hamin baluhay a nisulitan "micidakayÁ•≠„āäŚÜć„Ā≥" ci Ku-kwan-cun-i "matinenga patabanaw tu mali, matinengay patudud tu mali" malingatu tu "mimaliay a masakapahay" kungku. nisulitanay tu zuma a kawaw kanahatu malabas tu, nika mitudungay tu madademecay a ngangayaw a gizice. namahiza masakapahay mangga u wayway "caay kakelad". nika uyza litapanganay a "micidekay dadawaay amingayaw u nizatengan ni Ku-kwan, i kauzip u cayay tu, u mitudungay. nika i NHK a nisabalucu'an tatenga' u mimaliay mitahpu tu mata malaheci ku nitepa' tu mali. sakay cayay kanamuh mimaliay a tademaw miasip tu cudad, nisulitan nitelekan atu ngangayaw gizice pacumuden i kungku. kadademecanay "kaniyul", u zuma kanahatu mikedec tu litapangan anuca palekal, nika sakay anhuayaw a malaangangan. Patinaku "salunganay a pala" pasasa' patapabaw tu mali" "ś≠Ę„Āĺ„āč„Éą„āĻ" micidekay a kamu mazateng tu ku niliwanan a nisulitan. . kasumad nu tilibi ťõĽŤ¶ĖŚčēśÖč i 2013 a mihca 10 a bulad, ci-ing kitizaan patahkal tu nisulitan nu musaungayay. tilibi nu musaungayay namisanga' tu kung-ke-ci-tung a sakaputay, cuy-e-ung-kwan atu lumeni'ay mimaliay Production I.G kusi a nisanga'an. saayaway puu' ci Man-cung-cyen ku situngusay miazih, ci An-pen-co ku sutungusay tu mahiniay misakaput atu misulit tu saigaan a cudad, miseykiay a tademaw namilihizaay tu lin-ing a tademaw u miseykiay ci An-tyen-lung-hung ku situngusa, ci Cyen-ye-cung-yang, Hay-ku-min-cyu ku miazihay tu pulung nu mikulitay, misetinay tu wayway ci Cya-pey-tay ku situngusay, ci Cow-ten-cen-yu-mey ku situngnusay pakulitay miseyki, ci Cong-tyen-yu-mey-ce ku mala miazihay misasing. ci Ci-tyen-haw-ci ku mala miazihay tu laziw, u dadiw ci Lin-yu-su aci Ci-ma-mey tatusa ku situngusay. tilibi nu Zipun paydemiad patahkal namahiza milihiza misanga'. 2014 a mihca 4 a bilad 6 a demiad saayaway a puu' pademiad patahkal atu TBS 28 ku pahusiay a wangci nu tilibi m alingatu saayaway pahusu, pulung 25 ku kamu, namahiza Hng-kow u ANIMAX a tilibi malecad patahkal. uyni misaungayay i Zipun nu ANIMAX patahkal. zuma, uyni musaungayay a mangga i Zipun henay a wan-tay pin-taw, GYAO a wan gcan patahkal, i Ta-lu u yu-ke wangcan, tu-towwangcan patahkal, atu tilibi nu Zipun saayaway malecad patahkal. 2015 a mkihca 6 a bulad malingatu , i Zipun NOTTV tilibi patahkal tu saayaway nu musaungayay a mangga. Taywan i 2015 a mihca 1 a b ulad 3 a demiad malingatu, u Cong-hwavilibi kusi ku patahkalay. Syang-kang i 2015 a mihca 7 a bulad 20 a mihca i J2 tilibi mapatahkal tu.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺimad == mimar~…ĺiaj a masakapańßaj**** "mimar~…ĺiaj a masakapańßaj!" "kamu nu zipun, *****!, kamu nu iŇč ńßaikju!, imi nu sjakaŇč "mimar~…ĺiaj a masakapańßaj" nu zipun maŇčga ku-kwan- ¶un-iaj a nisur~…ĺitan tu masakapańßaj manŇčga, i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad i sinbun nu masakapańßaj *ump" r~…ĺar~…ĺid a patańßkar~…ĺ, ńßamin** a ¶udadan. katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad, ¶a ¶aj ku ¶udad pur~…ĺuŇč ku nipatańßkar~…ĺ pakar~…ĺa tu *,*** maŇč a ¶udadan. nisumadan tir~…ĺibi musauŇčajaj maŇčga saajawaj puu Ē~ ° i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺar~…ĺ saajawaj patańßkar~…ĺ, pur~…ĺuŇč ** ku kamuan, saktusa puu Ē~ ° i **** a mi ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad saajawaj patańßkar~…ĺ, pur~…ĺuŇč ** a kamuan. "igiaj masakapańßaj mimar~…ĺiaj!mar~…ĺpa ¶aw tu patatuni Ē~ °an" tini i**** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad i zipu patańßkar~…ĺ paazińß. bar~…ĺuńßaj iga *s sjaw- ¶i-z…ôn apatańßka paazińß. misur~…ĺit tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ **** misur~…ĺitaj ¶i ku-kwan- ¶un-i kanańßatu r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i j…ôn-su kuwan, nika ujni nisur~…ĺitan aŇčaŇčan u staj-j…ôn-taj-s, sjan-tajan atu sj…ôn-taj-s kaduba Ē~ °an sj…ôn,-taj a kitizaan amisur~…ĺit tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ. r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan u ku-kwan- ¶un-i zikuz nu pipańß…ôz…ôkan nu kaw- ¶uŇč, na i sj…ôn-taj-saj a sj…ôn-taj sinbuŇčaj misj…ôki tu ¶a ¶udadan r~…ĺar~…ĺabu mi ¶udad, saajawaj anisur~…ĺitan u "kuj-pan-sj…ô-paj s…ô-ku-sj…ô- ¶aŇč a kwaj-tan", itawja saajawaj situŇčusaj misur~…ĺit i kuŇč- ¶…ôn aa kuwan, namańßiza u kuŇč- ¶…ôn kuwan mar~…ĺa sasir~…ĺitan a kuŇčku kujni. ujni nisur~…ĺitan sakaj u-j…ô kaw- ¶uŇč atu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ ku nisur~…ĺit, aŇčaŇčan misur~…ĺit tu tiiaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ. kanańßatu ¶aaj ku tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj aŇčaŇčan ku kaw- ¶uŇč, nka tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° tiniaj a ¶a ¶udadan ku nisur~…ĺitan. namańßiza, ujni nisur~…ĺitan jadańß ku aazińßan mis…ôŇčiaj tu j…ôn-su-kuwan ¶in-mi-tin. zuma, ńßamin ¶oŇč-sj…ô nu zipun tuŇčus mimar~…ĺiaj a kar~…ĺ…ô ¶apu, ńßamin mimar~…ĺiaj nu zipun tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan mar~…ĺ…ô ¶apu ku mimar~…ĺiaj " ¶un-kaw madad…ôm…ô ¶ mimar~…ĺir~…ĺ", ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ tar~…ĺakmawaj a ¶a ¶udadan mapur~…ĺuŇč kar~…ĺ…ô ¶apuan maduba Ē~ ° "ińß ajaw a kadad…ôm…ô ¶" tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° a kadad…ôm…ô ¶, i nisur~…ĺitan izaw tu ku nipatańßkar~…ĺ. i ¶uńß- ¶uŇč atu kaw- ¶uŇč a zidaj, ¶i ku-kwan- ¶un-i u par~…ĺimaaj tu mimar~…ĺian. ¶i ku-kwan i ajaw a kar~…ĺar~…ĺid majdińß mikur~…ĺit tu ¶a ¶aj mar~…ĺu aŇčaŇčan misur~…ĺit tu mimar~…ĺiaj, nika, situŇčus misur~…ĺit tu mimar~…ĺiaj a maŇčga kan ¶a a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, sakasa ¶i ku-kwan- ¶un-i mipir~…ĺi Ē~ ° ajaw misaŇča Ē~ ° tu zumaaj a nisur~…ĺitan tu "s…ô-ku-sj…ô- ¶aŇč" i "s…ô-ku-sj…ô- ¶aŇč" ńßamin pańß…ôz…ôk, ¶i ku-kwan- ¶un-i amaar~…ĺa ku mimar~…ĺiaj a maŇčga, mar~…ĺiŇčatu i "masakapańßaj *ump n…ô*t!" **** a kasi…ônawan mi ¶unus i sinbunan patańßkar~…ĺ tu ¶a ¶aj a nisur~…ĺitan, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ i "sinbun nu masakapańßaj *ump" **** a mińß ¶aan **, ** papur~…ĺu maŇčguan tur~…ĺin patańßkar~…ĺ tu ¶a ¶aj a nisur~…ĺitan. kanańßatu zikuz ¶i ku-kwan- ¶in-i katur~…ĺin pakar~…ĺa, nika saajawajmaminaj makur~…ĺkit saajawaw a kamu jadańß tatu ku wajwaj a kamu, kju sa ¶aj ¶aj sa mir~…ĺisim…ôt, mańßiza tu nu ajzaaj. ¶a ¶ajaj a nisur~…ĺit ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan patańßkar~…ĺ zikuz, u pinaŇč mur~…ĺijaw a misumad, ujni nisur~…ĺitan tańßkar~…ĺ tu i "sinbun nu masakapuńßaj mir~…ĺit…ômuńß sazikuz panukas r~…ĺar~…ĺid patańßkar~…ĺ, * a mińß ¶a tu paŇčkiw mapańß…ôz…ôk tu. amikiniŇč tu nisur~…ĺitab mad…ôm ku ** a mińß ¶aan,**** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad matin…ôŇčaj patudud tu mar~…ĺi" mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu "mimar~…ĺiaj a masakapańßaj" kuŇčku. nisur~…ĺitanaj tu zuma a kawaw kanańßatu mar~…ĺabas tu, nika mituduŇčaj tu madad…ôm…ô ¶aj a ŇčaŇčajaw a gizi ¶…ô. namańßiza masakapańßaj maŇčga u wajwaj " ¶aaj kak…ôr~…ĺad". nika ujza r~…ĺitapaŇčanaj a "mi ¶id…ôkaj dadawaaj amiŇčajaw u nizat…ôŇčan ni ku-kwan, i kauzip u ¶ajaj tu, u mituduŇčaj. nika i nńßk a nisabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °an tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° u mimar~…ĺiaj mitańßpu tu mata mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i ku nit…ôpa Ē~ ° tu mar~…ĺi. sakaj ¶ajaj kanamuńß mimar~…ĺiaj a tad…ômaw miasip tu ¶udad, nisur~…ĺitan nit…ôr~…ĺ…ôkan atu ŇčaŇčajaw gizi ¶…ô pa ¶umud…ôn i kuŇčku. kadad…ôm…ô ¶anaj "kanijur~…ĺ", u zuma kanańßatu mik…ôd…ô ¶ tu r~…ĺitapaŇčan anu ¶a par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ, nika sakaj anńßuajaw a mar~…ĺaaŇčaŇčan. patinaku "sar~…ĺuŇčanaj a par~…ĺa" pasasa Ē~ ° patapabaw tu mar~…ĺi" "*****" mi ¶id…ôkaj a kamu mazat…ôŇč tu ku nir~…ĺiwanan a nisur~…ĺitan. . kasumad nu tir~…ĺibi **** i **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad, ¶i-iŇč kitizaan patańßkar~…ĺ tu nisur~…ĺitan nu musauŇčajaj. tir~…ĺibi nu musauŇčajaj namisaŇča Ē~ ° tu kuŇč-k…ô- ¶i-tuŇč a sakaputaj, ¶uj-…ô-uŇč-kwan atu r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj mimar~…ĺiaj produ ¶tion i.g kusi a nisaŇča Ē~ °an. saajawaj puu Ē~ ° ¶i man- ¶uŇč- ¶j…ôn ku situŇčusaj miazińß, ¶i an-p…ôn- ¶o ku sutuŇčusaj tu mańßiniaj misakaput atu misur~…ĺit tu saigaan a ¶udad, mis…ôkiaj a tad…ômaw namir~…ĺińßizaaj tu r~…ĺin-iŇč a tad…ômaw u mis…ôkiaj ¶i an-tj…ôn-r~…ĺuŇč-ńßuŇč ku situŇčusa, ¶i ¶j…ôn-j…ô- ¶uŇč-jaŇč, ńßaj-ku-min- ¶ju ku miazińßaj tu pur~…ĺuŇč nu mikur~…ĺitaj, mis…ôtinaj tu wajwaj ¶i ¶ja-p…ô-taj ku situŇčusaj, ¶i ¶ow-t…ôn- ¶…ôn-ju-m…ô ku situŇčnusaj pakur~…ĺitaj mis…ôki, ¶i ¶oŇč-tj…ôn-ju-m…ô- ¶…ô ku mar~…ĺa miazińßaj misasiŇč. ¶i ¶i-tj…ôn-ńßaw- ¶i ku mar~…ĺa miazińßaj tu r~…ĺaziw, u dadiw ¶i r~…ĺin-ju-su a ¶i ¶i-ma-m…ô tatusa ku situŇčusaj. tir~…ĺibi nu zipun pajd…ômiad patańßkar~…ĺ namańßiza mir~…ĺińßiza misaŇča Ē~ °. **** a mińß ¶a * a bir~…ĺad * a d…ômiad saajawaj a puu Ē~ ° pad…ômiad patańßkar~…ĺ atu tbs ** ku pańßusiaj a waŇč ¶i nu tir~…ĺibi m ar~…ĺiŇčatu saajawaj pańßusu, pur~…ĺuŇč ** ku kamu, namańßiza ńßŇč-kow u anima* a tir~…ĺibi mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad patańßkar~…ĺ. ujni misauŇčajaj i zipun nu anima* patańßkar~…ĺ. zuma, ujni musauŇčajaj a maŇčga i zipun ńß…ônaj a wan-taj pin-taw, gjao a wan g ¶an patańßkar~…ĺ, i ta-r~…ĺu u ju-k…ô waŇč ¶an, tu-towwaŇč ¶an patańßkar~…ĺ, atu tir~…ĺibi nu zipun saajawaj mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad patańßkar~…ĺ. **** a mkińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad mar~…ĺiŇčatu , i zipun nott* tir~…ĺibi patańßkar~…ĺ tu saajawaj nu musauŇčajaj a maŇčga. tajwan i **** a mińß ¶a * a b ur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad mar~…ĺiŇčatu, u ¶oŇč-ńßwa*ir~…ĺibi kusi ku patańßkar~…ĺaj. sjaŇč-kaŇč i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a mińß ¶a i ** tir~…ĺibi mapatańßkar~…ĺ tu.
S.FORM: == kakilimad == mimaliay a masakapahayśéíÁźÉŚįĎŚĻī "mimaliay a masakapahay!" "kamu nu Zipun, „ÉŹ„ā§„ā≠„É•„Éľ!, kamu nu Ing Haikyu!, imi nu Syakang "mimaliay a masakapahay" nu Zipun mangga ku-kwan-cun-iay a nisulitan tu masakapahay manngga, i 2012 a mihca 2 a bulad 20 a demiad katukuh 2020 a mihca 7 a bulad 20 a demiad i sinbun nu masakapahay Jump" lalid a patahkal, hamin45 a cudadan. katukuh 2024 a mihca 12 a bulad, cacay ku cudad pulung ku nipatahkal pakala tu 7,000 mang a cudadan. nisumadan tilibi musaungayay mangga saayaway puu' i 2014 a mihca 4 a bulal saayaway patahkal, pulung 25 ku kamuan, saktusa puu' i 2015 a mica 10 a bulad saayaway patahkal, pulung 25 a kamuan. "igiay masakapahay mimaliay!malpacaw tu patatuni'an" tini i2024 a mihca 2 a bulad 16 a demiad i Zipu patahkal paazih. baluhay iga vs syaw-ci-zen apatahka paazih. misulit tu hekal ŚČĶšĹúŤÉĆśôĮ misulitay ci Ku-kwan-cun-i kanahatu lecuh i Yen-su kuwan, nika uyni nisulitan angangan u stay-yen-tay-s, syan-tayan atu syen-tay-s kaduba'an syen,-tay a kitizaan amisulit tu hekal. lalekalan u ku-kwan-cun-i zikuz nu pipahezekan nu kaw-cung, na i syen-tay-say a syen-tay sinbungay misyeki tu cacudadan lalabu micudad, saayaway anisulitan u "kuy-pan-sye-pay se-ku-sye-cang a kway-tan", itawya saayaway situngusay misulit i kung-cen aa kuwan, namahiza u kung-cen kuwan mala sasilitan a kungku kuyni. uyni nisulitan sakay U-ye kaw-cung atu liwliw nu hekal ku nisulit, angangan misulit tu tiiay hekal. kanahatu caay ku tatenga'ay angangan ku kaw-cung, nka tatenga' tiniay a cacudadan ku nisulitan. namahiza, uyni nisulitan yadah ku aazihan misengiay tu Yen-su-kuwan cin-mi-tin. zuma, hamin cong-sye nu Zipun tungus mimaliay a kalecapu, hamin mimaliay nu Zipun talakaway a cacudadan malecapu ku mimaliay "cun-kaw madademec mimalil", hamin nu kanatal talakmaway a cacudadan mapulung kalecapuan maduba' "IH ayaw a kadademec" tatenga' a kadademec, i nisulitan izaw tu ku nipatahkal. i cuh-cung atu kaw-cung a ziday, ci Ku-kwan-cun-i u palimaay tu mimalian. ci Ku-kwan i ayaw a kalalid maydih mikulit tu cacay malu angangan misulit tu mimaliay, nika, situngus misulit tu mimaliay a mangga kanca a icelang, sakasa ci Ku-kwan-cun-I mipili' ayaw misanga' tu zumaay a nisulitan tu "se-ku-sye-cang" i "se-ku-sye-cang" hamin pahezek, ci Ku-kwan-cun-I amaala ku mimaliay a mangga, malingatu i "masakapahay JUMP NEXT!" 2011 a kasienawan micunus i sinbunan patahkal tu cacay a nisulitan, kilul i "sinbun nu masakapahay JUMP" 2011 a mihcaan 20, 21 papulu mangguan tulin patahkal tu cacay a nisulitan. kanahatu zikuz ci Ku-kwan-cin-I katulin pakala, nika saayawaymaminay makulkit saayawaw a kamu yadah tatu ku wayway a kamu, kyu sacaycay sa milisimet, mahiza tu nu ayzaay. cacayay a nisulit cacay a mihcaan patahkal zikuz, u pinang muliyaw a misumad, uyni nisulitan tahkal tu i "sinbun nu masakapuhay JUMP"2012 a mihcaan 12 banggu malingaatu tatenga'ay tu patahkal. 2020 a mihca 7 a bulad 20 a demiad, i Zipu a patahkal tu "sinbun nu masakapuhay JUMP" 33„ÉĽ34 pulung bangguan militemuh sazikuz panukas lalid patahkal, 8 a mihca tu pangkiw mapahezek tu. amikining tu nisulitab madem ku 10 a mihcaan,2022 a mihca 4 a bulad 25 a demiad anipatahkalan "sinbun nu masakapahay JUMP" 21„ÉĽ22 pulung banggu patahkal tu hamin baluhay a nisulitan "micidakayÁ•≠„āäŚÜć„Ā≥" ci Ku-kwan-cun-i "matinenga patabanaw tu mali, matinengay patudud tu mali" malingatu tu "mimaliay a masakapahay" kungku. nisulitanay tu zuma a kawaw kanahatu malabas tu, nika mitudungay tu madademecay a ngangayaw a gizice. namahiza masakapahay mangga u wayway "caay kakelad". nika uyza litapanganay a "micidekay dadawaay amingayaw u nizatengan ni Ku-kwan, i kauzip u cayay tu, u mitudungay. nika i NHK a nisabalucu'an tatenga' u mimaliay mitahpu tu mata malaheci ku nitepa' tu mali. sakay cayay kanamuh mimaliay a tademaw miasip tu cudad, nisulitan nitelekan atu ngangayaw gizice pacumuden i kungku. kadademecanay "kaniyul", u zuma kanahatu mikedec tu litapangan anuca palekal, nika sakay anhuayaw a malaangangan. Patinaku "salunganay a pala" pasasa' patapabaw tu mali" "ś≠Ę„Āĺ„āč„Éą„āĻ" micidekay a kamu mazateng tu ku niliwanan a nisulitan. . kasumad nu tilibi ťõĽŤ¶ĖŚčēśÖč i 2013 a mihca 10 a bulad, ci-ing kitizaan patahkal tu nisulitan nu musaungayay. tilibi nu musaungayay namisanga' tu kung-ke-ci-tung a sakaputay, cuy-e-ung-kwan atu lumeni'ay mimaliay Production I.G kusi a nisanga'an. saayaway puu' ci Man-cung-cyen ku situngusay miazih, ci An-pen-co ku sutungusay tu mahiniay misakaput atu misulit tu saigaan a cudad, miseykiay a tademaw namilihizaay tu lin-ing a tademaw u miseykiay ci An-tyen-lung-hung ku situngusa, ci Cyen-ye-cung-yang, Hay-ku-min-cyu ku miazihay tu pulung nu mikulitay, misetinay tu wayway ci Cya-pey-tay ku situngusay, ci Cow-ten-cen-yu-mey ku situngnusay pakulitay miseyki, ci Cong-tyen-yu-mey-ce ku mala miazihay misasing. ci Ci-tyen-haw-ci ku mala miazihay tu laziw, u dadiw ci Lin-yu-su aci Ci-ma-mey tatusa ku situngusay. tilibi nu Zipun paydemiad patahkal namahiza milihiza misanga'. 2014 a mihca 4 a bilad 6 a demiad saayaway a puu' pademiad patahkal atu TBS 28 ku pahusiay a wangci nu tilibi m alingatu saayaway pahusu, pulung 25 ku kamu, namahiza Hng-kow u ANIMAX a tilibi malecad patahkal. uyni misaungayay i Zipun nu ANIMAX patahkal. zuma, uyni musaungayay a mangga i Zipun henay a wan-tay pin-taw, GYAO a wan gcan patahkal, i Ta-lu u yu-ke wangcan, tu-towwangcan patahkal, atu tilibi nu Zipun saayaway malecad patahkal. 2015 a mkihca 6 a bulad malingatu , i Zipun NOTTV tilibi patahkal tu saayaway nu musaungayay a mangga. Taywan i 2015 a mihca 1 a b ulad 3 a demiad malingatu, u Cong-hwavilibi kusi ku patahkalay. Syang-kang i 2015 a mihca 7 a bulad 20 a mihca i J2 tilibi mapatahkal tu.
